ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source identifier for the property */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Run identifier for the property */,
  "file_id" TEXT /* External file ID associated with the property */,
  "room_id" TEXT /* Room identifier for the property */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the property record was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the property */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "price_per_night" TEXT /* Price per night for the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property owner */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the property */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the property */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the property */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the amenity record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the amenity record was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the amenity */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the amenity */,
  "is_popular" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the amenity is popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenity" (
  "property_amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-amenity relationship */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "amenity_id" TEXT /* ID of the amenity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  "is_default" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the amenity is a default for the property */,
  "is_custom" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the amenity is custom */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenity_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenity_amenity_id FOREIGN KEY ("amenity_id") REFERENCES amenities ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staging_property" (
  "staging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staging record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Source identifier for the property */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Run identifier for the property */,
  "file_id" TEXT /* External file ID associated with the property */,
  "room_id" TEXT /* Room identifier for the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of amenities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staging record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staging record was last updated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Postal or zip code of the property */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "price_per_night" TEXT /* Price per night for the property */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property owner */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the property */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the property */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the property */,
  "last_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the last review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staging_amenity" (
  "staging_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staging record */,
  "amenity_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staging record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the staging record was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the amenity */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the amenity */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the icon representing the amenity */,
  "is_popular" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the amenity is popular */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staging_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property or amenity */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "amenity_id" TEXT /* ID of the amenity being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property or amenity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_amenity_id FOREIGN KEY ("amenity_id") REFERENCES amenities ("amenity_id")
)
